stemHtml: When in the Northern Hemisphere at the same latitude the distance between isobars is equal then…

options.a: the coriolis force in a high pressure area is smaller than the gradient force in a high pressure area.
options.b: the wind around a low pressure area is stronger than around a high pressure area.
options.c: the geostrophic wind speed is less than the gradient wind speed in a low pressure area.
options.d: the gradient wind in a low pressure area is weaker than in a high pressure area.
